google-sheets:ActionAddRow.name: Add a row
google-sheets:ActionAddRow.description: Adds a new row to a Google Sheets worksheet.

nested.name: worksheetId
nested.label: Worksheet
nested.help: The worksheet must contain a table with column names and at least one filled row.

google-sheets:TriggerNewRow.name: Watch a worksheet
google-sheets:TriggerNewRow.description: Triggers when a user adds a new row to a selected worksheet.

nested.name: worksheetId
nested.label: Worksheet
nested.help: The worksheet must contain a table with column names and at least one filled row.

google-sheets:ActionGetReport.name: Select rows
google-sheets:ActionGetReport.description: Returns rows that match the criteria specified in a selected worksheet.

google-sheets:ActionUpdateRow.name: Update a row
google-sheets:ActionUpdateRow.description: Updates an existing row in a Google Sheets worksheet.

google-sheets:ActionDeleteRow.name: Delete a row
google-sheets:ActionDeleteRow.description: Deletes a row from a Google Sheets worksheet.

google-sheets:ActionGetCell.name: Get a cell
google-sheets:ActionGetCell.description: Returns the contents of a specified cell.

google-sheets:ActionUpdateCell.name: Update a cell
google-sheets:ActionUpdateCell.description: Updates the contents of a specified cell.

google-sheets:ActionListWorksheets.name: List worksheets
google-sheets:ActionListWorksheets.description: Gets a list of worksheets in spreadsheet.

google-sheets:ActionAddWorksheet.name: Add a worksheet
google-sheets:ActionAddWorksheet.description: Adds a new worksheet to a Google Sheets spreadsheet.

google-sheets:ActionDeleteWorksheet.name: Delete a worksheet
google-sheets:ActionDeleteWorksheet.description: Deletes a worksheet from a Google Sheets spreadsheet.

airtable:ActionCreateRecord.name: Create a record
airtable:ActionCreateRecord.description: Creates a new record in Airtable.

store.help: If smart links is enabled, you can a) use names in linked record fields instead of record IDs to select an existing record or create a new one if it doesn't exist b) use (add) new options in single/multiple select fields.
store.name: typecast
store.label: Smart links

airtable:ActionUpdateRecords.name: Update a record
airtable:ActionUpdateRecords.description: Updates a record by its ID.

airtable:ActionGetRecord.name: Retrieve a record
airtable:ActionGetRecord.description: Retrieves a single record by its ID.

airtable:ActionDeleteRecord.name: Delete a record
airtable:ActionDeleteRecord.description: Deletes a record by its ID.

airtable:ActionSearchRecords.name: Search records
airtable:ActionSearchRecords.description: Searches for specific records or returns all records.

airtable:TriggerWatchRecords.name: Watch records
airtable:TriggerWatchRecords.description: Returns all newly created or updated records in a view.

notion:createDataSourceItem.name: Create a Data Source Item
notion:createDataSourceItem.description: Creates a new item in a data source.

nested.help: Key: The name of a field, Value Type: Each fields have their own value type, Value: The input value
nested.name: fields
nested.label: Fields

notion:watchDatabaseItems.name: Watch Data Source Items
notion:watchDatabaseItems.description: Triggers when a Data source (legacy database) item is created or updated.

notion:watchDatabasesPages.name: Watch Objects
notion:watchDatabasesPages.description: Triggers when a data source, page or legacy database is created and updated.

notion:createAPage1.name: Create a Page
notion:createAPage1.description: Creates a new page in a specified page.

notion:getADatabaseItem.name: Get a Data Source Item
notion:getADatabaseItem.description: Gets a specified data source (or legacy database) item.

notion:updateADatabaseItem.name: Update a Data Source Item
notion:updateADatabaseItem.description: Updates an existing data source (or legacy database) item.

notion:searchObjects1.name: Search Objects
notion:searchObjects1.description: Searches for objects of a page, database, or database item.

notion:createADatabaseV2.name: Create a Database
notion:createADatabaseV2.description: Creates a new database with default data source.

notion:makeApiCall.name: Make an API Call
notion:makeApiCall.description: Performs an arbitrary authorized API call.
